# ITK Morphological Contour Interpolation

This directory contains the header-only ITK
`MorphologicalContourInterpolator` filter used by Atlas interpolation code.
It is kept separate from Bio-Formats and SCIFIO ImageIO because it is not an
image file reader and does not require the Java Bio-Formats bridge.

The files retain their upstream NumFOCUS Apache 2.0 license headers.
